column1: # Custom partition layout for the 16 MB flash on ESP32-S3-WROOM-1-N16R8.
# Layout: single-OTA app slot of 4 MB plus an 11.8 MB LittleFS data
# partition for pushed character packs. Keeps NVS at the default 0x9000
# Label MUST be "spiffs" -- Arduino-ESP32's LittleFS::begin() defaults to that
# partition label even though the on-disk format is LittleFS (the subtype is
# what makes it a filesystem slot; the on-disk format is independent).
